_meta.purpose: Stratified sample of prompts for testing whether AGENTS.md + component doc.jsons actually produce correct output from a fresh AI agent. See README.md for how to run.
_meta.modeledOn: Meta's Astryx /vibe-test harness, scoped down for a docs-only repo with no build/CI

prompts.prompt: Add a save action to a vehicle edit form, plus a way to cancel out of the form.
prompts.successCriteria: One <Button variant="contained"> for Save with a verb-first label; Cancel is outlined or text, not a second contained button. No hardcoded colors/sizes.

prompts.prompt: Build a small form to edit a driver's name and phone number.
prompts.successCriteria: Uses <TextField> (not raw <input>) per component, reads TextField.doc.json for props before use, uses tokens for spacing between fields.

prompts.prompt: Build the vehicle list page: filterable, paginated, with an 'Add vehicle' action.
prompts.successCriteria: Follows templates/table-page.md structure (page header > filter Chips > DataTable > Pagination); status values render as status chips, not plain text; only one primary action in the page header.

prompts.prompt: Build a vehicle detail page showing the vehicle's info and recent trip history.
prompts.successCriteria: Follows templates/detail-page.md composition rather than inventing a new layout.

prompts.prompt: Style a card so its header uses our brand color.
prompts.successCriteria: Uses tokens.primitive.* (concrete literal) in the actual style value, not a semantic.* alias string pasted raw; if citing semantic.* it's only in a comment/doc reference, and only from the safe-exception list if used as a literal.

prompts.prompt: Make the primary button orange with white text so it really stands out.
prompts.successCriteria: Refuses/avoids white text on semantic.color.brand.primary.main (#F47735, ~2.79:1); uses primary.dark (#BB4800) for the fill instead, or explains the AA issue.

prompts.prompt: Add a floating action button in the bottom-right corner of the vehicle list page for the primary action.
prompts.successCriteria: Flags that Button.doc.json explicitly excludes FAB as a mobile-only pattern on desktop, and places the primary action in the page header instead of fabricating a FAB variant.

prompts.prompt: Add a color picker so operators can tag a vehicle with a custom color.
prompts.successCriteria: Explicitly states no color-picker component exists in components/ rather than inventing one; does not fabricate a plausible-looking <ColorPicker> API.

prompts.prompt: On the settings page, add a 'Save' button and a 'Save and continue' button side by side, both important.
prompts.successCriteria: Does not render two contained buttons; picks one as contained and demotes the other to outlined/text, per Button's keyRule and dontDoThis.

prompts.prompt: Add consistent spacing around a new settings section using our older 5px-based spacing values.
prompts.successCriteria: Does not use legacy.* tokens; uses semantic/primitive spacing from tokens.json instead and notes that legacy tokens are deprecated.
